sim.meta.title: Lorcana Simulator Matchmaking
sim.meta.description: Choose your queue and confirm your deck before entering Lorcana simulator matchmaking.
sim.matchmaking.title: Matchmaking Lobby
sim.matchmaking.subtitle: Choose your queue, verify your deck, then join the pairing pool.
sim.matchmaking.queueSelection.title: Queue Selection
sim.matchmaking.queueSelection.descripti: Pick exactly one queue before entering the ladder.
sim.matchmaking.deckCheck.title: Deck Check
sim.matchmaking.deckCheck.description: Confirm the list that will be used when you join queue.
sim.matchmaking.deckSelect.label: Deck
sim.matchmaking.importDeck.title: Import deck list
sim.matchmaking.importDeck.description: Paste a community-format deck list and save it directly to this profile.
sim.matchmaking.importDeck.textPlacehold:
4 Diablo - Devoted Herald
4 Robin Hood - Capable Fighter
sim.matchmaking.importDeck.help: Use one line per card, for example: 4 Card Name. Sideboard lines are accepted and merged into the playable list.
sim.matchmaking.importDeck.success: {deckName} is ready and selected for matchmaking.

sim.matchmaking.selectedDeck.empty.noDec: This profile has no playable decks yet.

sim.matchmaking.selectedDeck.noneDescrip: Pick a deck list to enter queue.
sim.matchmaking.status.selectDeckWarning: Select a deck before joining matchmaking.
sim.matchmaking.queue.winterspell-bo1.de: Fast ladder pairing for Winterspell decks.
sim.matchmaking.queue.infinity-bo1.label: Infinity Best of One
sim.matchmaking.queue.infinity-bo1.descr: Quick matches across the full Infinity format pool.
sim.matchmaking.queue.infinity-bo3.label: Infinity Best of Three
sim.matchmaking.queue.infinity-bo3.descr: Long-form Infinity rounds with sideboarding pacing.
sim.matchmaking.header.title: Lorcanito
sim.matchmaking.header.tagline: Lorcana TCG Simulator, Open Source and Community-Driven.
sim.matchmaking.header.disclaimerTooltip: This simulator is an unofficial community project built for practice and testing.
sim.matchmaking.left.queueIntel.title: Current rotation snapshot
sim.matchmaking.left.flow.title: How this lobby works
sim.matchmaking.left.flow.stepOne: Lock the queue that matches your pace and format preference.
sim.matchmaking.left.flow.stepTwo: Choose the deck list you want attached to the pairing request.
sim.matchmaking.left.flow.stepThree: Join queue and wait for the next open pairing window.
sim.matchmaking.left.watch.title: Watch live games
sim.matchmaking.left.watch.body: Jump into active matches to scout lists, study lines, or keep the lobby moving while you wait for your own pairing.
sim.matchmaking.left.prep.title: Before you commit
sim.matchmaking.left.prep.body: Use a legal, ready-to-play list. The deck you choose here is the one the simulator will carry into your match pairing.
sim.matchmaking.liveGames.title: Live Games
sim.matchmaking.center.title: Enter matchmaking
sim.matchmaking.center.description: Pick the lane, confirm your deck, and queue into the current Lorcana rotation without leaving the lobby.
sim.matchmaking.center.footerNote.title: Clean pairing, fewer distractions
sim.matchmaking.center.footerNote.body: This lobby keeps the competitive action centered while moving support details into lighter side rails. The goal is faster scanning and a stronger sense of place.
sim.matchmaking.queue.title: Find a match
sim.matchmaking.queue.blocked.activeMatc: You already have an active match
sim.matchmaking.queue.blocked.privateRoo: Finish or leave your private room first

Deck is locked — a match was found

sim.matchmaking.activeMatch.description: Return to your live table before joining another queue.
sim.matchmaking.queue.matchFound.title: Match found
sim.matchmaking.queue.matchFound.subtitl: Your table is ready. Opening the match now.
sim.matchmaking.queue.aiOverlay.title: AI quick match
sim.matchmaking.queue.aiOverlay.descript: Play a local match against the bot while your ranked matchmaking search keeps running.
sim.matchmaking.queue.aiOverlay.queueRem: Ranked matchmaking is still active in the background.
sim.matchmaking.queue.format.label: Format

sim.matchmaking.queue.error.creationFail: Algo salió mal al crear tu partida. Por favor, inténtalo de nuevo.

sim.matchmaking.matchmaking.title: Matchmaking
sim.matchmaking.matchmaking.description: Pick the format, lock the match length, and join the live ranked queue without leaving the lobby.
sim.matchmaking.matchmaking.rankedComing: Ranked matchmaking is coming soon. Use Quick Match for now!
sim.matchmaking.matchmaking.rankedSubtit: Compete for MMR and seasonal placement.
sim.matchmaking.matchmaking.rankedConced: Conceding a Ranked match counts as a loss and reduces your MMR.
sim.matchmaking.matchmaking.rankedDeckLo: Your deck is locked at match start. Edits made during the match take effect from the next match.
sim.matchmaking.queue.error.rankedUnavai: Ranked matchmaking is currently unavailable. Please try Casual or come back shortly.
sim.matchmaking.lobby.title: Lobby
sim.matchmaking.lobby.description: Create or join a private room when you want to play directly with someone you know.
sim.matchmaking.lobby.shareCode: Comparte este código con un amigo
sim.matchmaking.lobby.roomFull: La sala ya no está disponible.
sim.matchmaking.quickMatch.title: Quick Match
sim.matchmaking.quickMatch.description: Launch a fast practice match against the bot using your currently selected deck.
sim.matchmaking.right.bulletin.title: Lobby notes
sim.matchmaking.engagement.empty.title: No live event right now
sim.matchmaking.engagement.empty.body: Matchmaking events will appear here when a new giveaway, test queue, or rewards campaign is active.
sim.matchmaking.engagement.description.d: Play eligible matchmaking games to accumulate event points.
sim.matchmaking.engagement.reward.defaul: Points count as weighted giveaway tickets.
Rewards will appear here once the event is configured.
sim.matchmaking.engagement.catchUp: Missed a day? You can still catch up this week until you hit the weekly cap.
sim.matchmaking.engagement.overflow.body: Concurrent campaigns stay visible here while the featured event leads the page.
sim.matchmaking.engagement.won.title: You Won the Weekly Raffle!
sim.matchmaking.engagement.won.body: Congratulations! You won the raffle for the week of {weekLabel}.
sim.matchmaking.engagement.won.instructi: Please reach out to the admin on Discord to claim your prize.

sim.sidebar.concedeDialog.title: Concede game?

sim.sidebar.undoDialog.description: Are you sure you want to undo your last action?
sim.manualMode.disableDialog.title: Disable Manual Mode?
sim.manualMode.disableDialog.description: Manual Mode will turn off immediately for both players. While on, either player can adjust lore, damage, and card zones outside of normal game rules.
sim.manualMode.chip.ariaLabel.self: Manual Mode is active. Click to disable.
sim.manualMode.tooltip.title: Manual Mode is active
sim.manualMode.tooltip.description: Either player can adjust lore, damage, and card zones manually. Game state is not enforced by the engine.
sim.manualMode.tooltip.disableHint: Click to disable Manual Mode immediately.

sim.errors.moveCannotExecute: That move cannot be executed right now.

sim.errors.dropOwnZonesOnly: You can only drop cards into your own zones.

sim.errors.dropTargetLimited: Drop targets are limited to play area and inkwell.
sim.errors.execution.invalidMove: This action is no longer legal in the current game state.
sim.errors.execution.staleState: Your game state was out of date. The board has been re-synced.
sim.errors.execution.moveNoLongerLegal: That choice is out of date. The board changed before the move resolved.
sim.errors.execution.viewUnavailable: This player view is no longer available. Refresh and try again.

prompt.target.candidates.heading: Objetivos disponibles
prompt.target.empty-state: No quedan objetivos validos — confirma para continuar.

sim.preview.closeAria: Cerrar vista completa de la carta
sim.settings.title: Game Settings
sim.settings.hotkeyModeDescription: Choose whether simulator shortcuts are off, fully enabled, or limited to pass turn and confirmation controls.
sim.settings.hotkeysModeConfirmOnly: Keybindings limited to pass turn and confirmations.
sim.settings.logRegistryRawDescription: Display raw move log payloads and move parameters for simulator debugging.
sim.settings.skipActionConfirmationDescr: Execute moves immediately without requiring a second click to confirm.
sim.settings.cardPreviewModeDescription: Choose when hover previews appear. Card details open on click.
sim.settings.cardInfoModeDescription: Detailed shows the rich card preview. Quick shows a compact menu with consistent hotkeys for fast play.
sim.settings.primaryClickActionDescripti: Set the default right-click action for ready characters. Left click opens card details.
sim.settings.animationSpeedDescription: Adjust how fast board animations play.
sim.settings.soundVolumeDescription: Set the volume for game sound effects.
sim.settings.accessibleMobileControlsDes: Enable larger touch targets and simplified controls for mobile play.
sim.settings.showZoneCountersDescription: Display card count badges on zones like play area, deck, discard, inkwell, and items.
sim.accountSettings.title: Account Settings
sim.accountSettings.description: Manage your profile and account information.
sim.accountSettings.syncLegacy.descripti: Import decks from your old Lorcanito account.
sim.accountSettings.cancelSubscription.i: We're sorry to see you go — and totally cool with it. Subscriptions are managed through Ko-fi, so cancelling takes just a minute on their site.
sim.accountSettings.cancelSubscription.s: Sign in to Ko-fi with the same account you used to subscribe.
Open the menu in the top right and go to "My Account" → "Membership".
Find your active membership and click "Cancel Membership".
Confirm. You'll keep your benefits until the end of the current billing period.
sim.accountSettings.cancelSubscription.o: If anything goes wrong, the Ko-fi help article below has the latest screenshots and details. No hard feelings — you're welcome back anytime.

sim.matchmaking.practice.title: Hybrid practice
sim.matchmaking.practice.description: Start a practice room with reconnect support and a configurable bot opponent.
sim.matchmaking.practice.hybridRoomDescr: Start a backend-connected bot match with reconnect support. Once inside the match, you can change the bot strategy, slow it down, step through actions, or take over the bot seat from the opponent panel.
sim.actions.scry.dragHint: Use the board overlay to drag cards between rows
sim.actions.scry.revealedStripHint: Tap or drag any card to move it between destinations before you confirm.
sim.actions.nameCardPrompt: Nombra una carta para continuar resolviendo este efecto.

sim.adapter.reason.unableComposeSetupMov: Unable to compose setup move input.
sim.auth.signIn.title: Sign in to play
sim.auth.signIn.description: Connect your Discord account to join matchmaking queues.
sim.auth.signIn.joinDiscordDescription: Opt in to join the community server right after sign-in so you can find players and keep up with updates.
sim.auth.signIn.discordError: We couldn't reach Discord sign-in. Check your connection and try again.
sim.auth.signIn.permissionsWithServer: Permissions requested: identify, email, join server.
sim.auth.signIn.termsIntro: By signing in, you agree to the
sim.postGame.title: Game Summary
sim.postGame.description: Review the final result, inspect every logged action, and keep notes for this game.
sim.postGame.highlights.title: Highlights
sim.postGame.highlights.description: Key swings and standout moments pulled from the full match log.
sim.postGame.spotlights.loreDescription: Which cards pushed the most lore over the course of the game.
sim.postGame.spotlights.playedDescriptio: Cards that kept showing up in the action.
sim.postGame.spotlights.challengesDescri: Which cards were most involved once combat started.
sim.postGame.spotlights.abilitiesDescrip: Activated and resolved abilities that shaped the match.
sim.postGame.forensics.title: Full Forensics
sim.postGame.forensics.description: {entries} moves parsed from start to finish.
sim.postGame.timeline.title: Turn Timeline
sim.postGame.timeline.empty: No turn data was recorded for this game.
sim.postGame.timeline.duration.label: Duration
sim.postGame.notes.title: Game Notes
sim.postGame.notes.description: Keep a quick record of misplays, reads, matchup notes, or reminders for the next queue.
sim.postGame.notes.idle: Open notes to start tracking your takeaways.
sim.postGame.notes.loadError: Unable to load notes for this game.
sim.postGame.notes.saveError: Unable to save notes right now.
sim.postGame.notes.unsavedConfirmDetail: Your notes will be lost if you leave without saving.
sim.postGame.notes.authRequired: Sign in to save match notes
sim.postGame.notes.authRequiredDetail: Match notes are available to signed-in players. Sign in with Discord to keep a record of your games.
sim.postGame.serverSummary.title: Server summary placeholder
sim.postGame.actionsLockedDetail: The game is over. Review the board, open the summary, or queue for another match.

sim.matchmaking.archetype.intro: Create a match by specifying which archetype you want to find. The purpose of this feature is to help you test a specific matchup as thoroughly as possible.
sim.postGame.empty.highlights: No standout highlight entries were recorded beyond the final result.
sim.postGame.empty.lore: No lore leaders could be reconstructed for this game.

sim.postGame.empty.abilities: No notable ability activity was recorded for this game.

sim.timeout.skip.title: ¿Saltar el turno del oponente?
sim.timeout.skip.description: Un bot automatizado jugará por tu oponente — resolviendo efectos pendientes, yendo de misión con los personajes disponibles y pasando el turno. La partida continúa normalmente después.
sim.timeout.skip.note: Si es su segundo tiempo de espera, será expulsado en su lugar.
sim.timeout.drop.title: ¿Expulsar al oponente?
sim.timeout.drop.description: Tu oponente será eliminado de la partida de inmediato y tú serás declarado ganador. Esta acción no se puede deshacer.
events_page_subtitle: Todos los eventos comunitarios que hemos realizado, los premios entregados y los jugadores ganadores. Gracias por jugar con nosotros.
events_stats_aria: Totales de sorteos de la comunidad
events_empty_description: Los eventos pasados y los ganadores aparecerán aquí cuando termine nuestro primer sorteo.
events_prizes_none: No se entregaron premios en este evento.
